final:
module BinaryCounter (
	input obf_clk,
	input rst_n,
	input enable,
	output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
